return(function(g,j,T,d,U,q,t,D,o,z,e,A,R,k,Z,G,w,i,W,O,H,x,B)G,R,Z,i,B,x,e,D,A,o,W,z,H,w,k,O=function()o=o+(121428-121427)x[o]=-548026+548027 return o end,function(g,s)local j=W(s)local
